simple_math module¶

A collection of simple math operations

Functions¶

simple_add : Add two numbers simple_sub : Subtract two numbers simple_mult : Multiply two numbers simple_div : Divide two numbers poly_first : Evaluate a first-order polynomial poly_second : Evaluate a second-order polynomial

param object：float or int:

returns:

result

rtype:

float or int

Example

>>>simple_math.simple_add(1,2) 3

simple_math.poly_first(x, a0, a1)¶
simple_math.poly_second(x, a0, a1, a2)¶
simple_math.simple_add(a, b)¶
simple_math.simple_div(a, b)¶
simple_math.simple_mult(a, b)¶
simple_math.simple_sub(a, b)¶
